mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM product
product_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{productName}, '%')
SELECT id, product_code, product_name, specification, unit, category, sale_price, remark, status, created_time, updated_time FROM product WHERE product_code = #{productCode} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO product ( product_code, product_name, specification, unit, category, sale_price, remark, status ) VALUES ( #{productCode}, #{productName}, #{specification}, #{unit}, #{category}, #{salePrice}, #{remark}, 1 )
mapper.select: SELECT id, product_code, product_name, specification, unit, category, sale_price, remark, status, created_time, updated_time FROM product WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE product SET product_name = #{productName}, specification = #{specification}, unit = #{unit}, category = #{category}, sale_price = #{salePrice}, remark = #{remark} WHERE id = #{id}
